content.en:
After swallowing the Void Golden Fruit, Ye Tian clearly felt that his physical body was becoming stronger at an incredible speed, and his soul was becoming more and more condensed, as if a Soul Tribulation Realm powerhouse had been promoted to an invincible person.

Moreover, countless inspirations have appeared, and the understanding is also growing.

Ye Tian felt that any treasure he had taken in the past was scumbag compared to the Void Golden Fruit.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian kept improving, as if there was no end.

I don't know how long it has been, Ye Tian found that the energy of the Void Mi Golden Fruit had been exhausted, and the changes in his body had ended.

At this time, he tested the changes in his body.

The body is enhanced tenfold, the soul is thirtyfold, and the perception is eightfold.

This is from the foundation to strengthen, not to improve the cultivation, this is terrifying, it is equivalent to Ye Tian's future combat strength at the same level of force.

Especially the soul, it is very difficult to improve, and if you want to be promoted to a second-class invincible, the invincible who has been promoted from the physical body tribulation realm must also raise the soul to the corresponding tribulation realm, and Ye Tian felt that his soul was almost to that level.

In other words, there will be no difficulty for him to be promoted to a second-class invincible in the future.

For this alone, the Void Mi Golden Fruit is priced at one billion contribution value, which is not expensive at all, or even very cheap, but even if it has a contribution value, it may not be able to buy it, because the Void Mi Golden Fruit is too rare, and Tianfeng Sea may not have it, and it even needs to wait in line, as for when it needs to wait, it is difficult to say.

"It's a pity that the next Void Mi Golden Fruit will have to wait for 30,000 Tribulation Yuan, maybe by then, I have already reached the realm of a first-class invincible, and the Void Mi Golden Fruit will be useless to me. However, with such a void gold mountain, more and more geniuses will be born in our human race in the future, and they must be protected!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Moreover, he always felt that the Void Mi Golden Mountain should have more than the role of nurturing the Void Mi Golden Fruit, but he had seen too little now, and when it came to treasures of the level of the Eternal Source Matter, few secrets would naturally not be passed on.

When his strength becomes stronger and his status in Tianfeng Sea is high, he may be able to learn more secrets.

His comprehension was enhanced, and Ye Tian's speed of perfecting the Ten Thousand Sources to Return to the Ruins was faster.

In the blink of an eye, another great tribulation time has passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already perfected the second level of Wanyuan Guiru to the consummation realm, and the ontology had also cultivated to the second consummation realm with the help of a large number of top-grade robbery stones, and his strength was much stronger than before.

Wanyuan Guiru is the second consummation, and his cultivation has reached the extreme of a fifth-class invincible, and Ye Tian can only create an invincible ancestral skill if he wants to continue to improve.

And now, Ye Tian has already had a number of invincible ancestral skills about to be created, but he has been holding back not to create them.

"Now you can create these invincible ancestral skills one by one!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It didn't take long for the second Invincible Ancestral Skill to be created.

This Invincible Ancestral Skill is a defensive Invincible Ancestral Skill, which combines a variety of defensive supreme ancestral skills, and is the top defensive Invincible Ancestral Skill, called Yuangang Hood.

After creating this invincible ancestral technique, and fusing this invincible ancestral technique, Ye Tian's physical body began to change qualitatively.

Then, Ye Tian created the speed-type invincible ancestral skill-Polar Shadow!

Then the Polar Shadow Invincible Ancestral Technique, Ye Tian's physical body changed qualitatively again, and then the combination of the three invincible ancestral techniques and the physical body, coupled with the cultivation to reach the extreme of the fifth-rank invincible, the invincible body robbery was also extremely powerful, so he completed the transition between the fifth-rank invincible and the fourth-rank invincible.

"Finally promoted to the fourth rank invincible!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

The fourth-rank invincible is not only much stronger than the fifth-rank invincible, but also can perfectly exert the power of the invincible ancestral technique, while the fifth-rank invincible can only exert half of the power, which is the difference between the two.

Moreover, the fourth-rank invincible can vaguely sense the rules of the eternal heaven and earth, while the fifth-rank invincible cannot do it.

After becoming a fourth-rank invincible, Ye Tian could continue to improve his cultivation, and he could continue to cultivate the third level of Ten Thousand Sources Returning to the Ruins.

Strictly speaking, the third-class invincible is the ultimate of the invincible, and the second-class invincible and the first-class invincible are the other two realms, representing a level far beyond the limit of the normal invincible.

If you want to become a third-class invincible, you must reach six tribulations when the strongest person robs the crystal, and you must cultivate the invincible body robbery to the perfection that ordinary people can achieve, of course, this restriction does not exist for the invincible person who has cultivated the invincible body robbery method.

Moreover, it is necessary to master more invincible skills, and only three invincible skills are definitely not enough, at least more than ten invincible skills are required, and a variety of rules are involved.

Becoming a third-class invincible has a special ability, and this ability can discern whether you have reached the third-class invincible.

This ability is to absorb the energy in the source sea!

Normal invincibles are unable to absorb the energy of the source sea, while third-class invincibles can absorb the energy of the source sea.

No matter how strong Ye Tian's strength is, he is even stronger than an ordinary third-class invincible, but he still can't be regarded as a third-class invincible.

After becoming a fourth-rank invincible, Ye Tian let his copy body start hunting those powerful tribulation beasts, even the Thousand Tribulation Tribulation Beasts were not his opponents, he could easily kill them.

And a Thousand Tribulation Tribulation Beast can earn at least one million contribution points, and the Thousand Tribulation Tribulation Beast is very many.

Therefore, Ye Tian hunted a lot of Thousand Tribulation Beasts in a short period of time, and unknowingly accumulated hundreds of millions of contribution points.

Due to multiple kills, the duplicate body did not fall once, so it accumulated enough beast resentment aura on its body.

this day.

A terrifying beast aura came across many exotic worlds.

Ye Tian immediately realized that this was definitely a hundred thousand tribulation beasts, so he annihilated this replica body by himself for the first time.

"Careless, you shouldn't always use the same copy body to hunt the robber beast, and not change the copy body, next time you have to pay attention, after hunting some robber beasts, disperse the copy body, and then copy a new body, otherwise it will be easy to attract the attention of 100,000 robber beasts!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

-----------------------

Tianlin Realm, Windless Mountain.

Ye Tian came to the Tianfeng Sea headquarters and was ready to apply to become an elite member.

If you want to become an elite member of the Heavenly Wind Sea, you must meet two conditions, one is to reach hundreds of millions of cumulative contribution points, and Ye Tian has already completed this goal, and the second is to cultivate to reach the realm of a fourth-rank invincible.

Of course, there are also fifth-rank invincibles who have become elite-level members, but all of them have huge backgrounds or amazing contributions, such as Tianfenghai will occasionally issue some tasks, once these tasks are completed, even if they can't cultivate, they can become elite-level members.

However, such a task is rare.
